backlog.description: Backlog.md — product backlog, tasks, milestones. Business tạo via browser UI, agent đọc/ghi via MCP. Cross-branch visible.

sequential-thinking.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning — use for complex planning and architecture decisions

playwright.description: Browser automation — E2E testing, web scraping, visual verification

_comments.secrets: Never hardcode tokens here — this file is committed to git. Use ${ENV_VAR} syntax.
_comments.limit: Keep under 10 MCPs total to preserve context window
_comments.disable: To disable a server per-session: set disabledMcpServers in settings.local.json
_comments.add-more: Browse full catalog at mcp-configs/mcp-servers.json in the ECC repo
